# SpatialAudioPlayer3D.MaxOcclusionHits property

Maximum number of walls (collisions) to detect between the emitter and the listener. Each additional wall multiplicatively reduces the lowpass cutoff, making the sound progressively more muffled.

```csharp
public int MaxOcclusionHits { get; set; }
```
